headline: Trump Vs. American Farmers: Strait Of Hormuz Closure Poses 'Food Security' Risk, Agriculture Groups Warn
summary: The agriculture sector is worried about the prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Here's what groups are telling President Trump.

raw.headline: Trump Vs. American Farmers: Strait Of Hormuz Closure Poses 'Food Security' Risk, Agriculture Groups Warn

headline: Iran War Oil Shock Is Spreading — And Your Food Bill Could Be The Next Hit
summary: Oil above $110 is now hitting fertilizer supply, with prices up 30–40%. The Iran war may trigger a second wave of food inflation risks.

raw.headline: Iran War Oil Shock Is Spreading — And Your Food Bill Could Be The Next Hit
raw.summary: Oil above $110 is now hitting fertilizer supply, with prices up 30–40%. The Iran war may trigger a second wave of food inflation risks.

headline: The Mosaic Company (MOS) Traded Down Due to Softer Fertilizer Demand
summary: Carillon Tower Advisers, an investment management company, released its fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter for the “Carillon Scout Mid Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Major U.S. equity indices delivered positive returns in the fourth quarter, while the Russell Midcap® Index return lagged with nominal positive gains. Strong corporate earnings revisions […]

headline: More than 40 Middle East energy assets ‘severely damaged,’ IEA chief says
summary: The IEA’s Fatih Birol warned that damage to energy infrastructure across the Middle East would take some time to repair.
